title: Star Rating to 10 for NPS - net promoter score rating scale
excerpt:
Would love to have the star rating either have the option to go to 10 for net promoter score rating scale or be able a custom rating star/heart scale. 
Would love to be able to add descriptions to each level as well.

posts.author: bbihun (Brad Bihun)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would love to have the star rating either have the option to go to 10 for net promoter score rating scale or be able a custom rating star/heart scale.

Would love to be able to add descriptions to each level as well.

posts.author: Steven1 (Steven)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Brad,

Amazing feedback. I hear you and agree this would be a valuable addition!
